Asset type: formal tarot card illustration for MELE website asset /tarot/cards/forest_athena/10.webp
Primary request: Create a finished, formal tarot illustration for Wheel of Fortune (命運之輪) in the forest_athena world.
Scene/backdrop: 雅典娜守護的月光橄欖聖林裡，橄欖聖域、月桂環、青銅神盾與隱約的女神守護構成命運之輪的核心畫面；命運之輪轉動，時機比蠻力更重要。
Subject and visual cue: 以雅典娜的智慧、古金枝葉、橄欖光與青銅微光呈現命運之輪：橄欖聖域、月桂環、青銅神盾與隱約的女神守護，中心保留清楚的象徵焦點。
Style/medium: Athena-guarded moonlit forest tarot deck, sacred olive grove and laurel symbolism, bronze aegis glow, moss, roots, carved temple stones, owl-feather-like wisdom motifs without literal animals as main subject, soft gold, deep green, and tempered bronze, quiet sacred strategy atmosphere, painterly high-detail collectible tarot illustration, mature editorial fantasy art, layered symbolic composition, refined lighting, print-quality card art
Composition/framing: vertical 2:3 tarot-card crop, central symbolic focus, clear silhouette, enough clean space near top and bottom for the website to overlay labels if needed
Lighting/mood: cinematic but readable, mystical, premium, emotionally specific to the card, not generic background art
Constraints: each card must feel like a distinct tarot scene, not a repeated template; preserve the original archetype while speaking through Athena as the unseen patron of wisdom, protection, strategy, and just action
Avoid: no readable text, no title, no card number, no watermark, no logo, no modern clothing, no cartoon, no anime, no low-detail icon, no UI mockup, no border text

Asset type: formal tarot card illustration for MELE website asset /tarot/cards/ancient_pharaoh/69.webp
Primary request: Create a finished, formal tarot illustration for Six of Pentacles (錢幣六) in the ancient_pharaoh world.
Scene/backdrop: 金砂神殿裡，金盤、穀倉印記、石台與王室秤錘構成錢幣六的核心畫面；能量開始移動，帶你離開原本的位置。
Subject and visual cue: 以青金石、金刃與石刻誓言呈現錢幣六：金盤、穀倉印記、石台與王室秤錘，中心保留清楚的象徵焦點。
Style/medium: ancient pharaoh tarot deck, Egyptian temple geometry, sandstone, gold leaf, lapis blue accents, ritual chamber lighting, fate and judgement atmosphere, painterly high-detail collectible tarot illustration, mature editorial fantasy art, layered symbolic composition, refined lighting, print-quality card art
Composition/framing: vertical 2:3 tarot-card crop, central symbolic focus, clear silhouette, enough clean space near top and bottom for the website to overlay labels if needed
Lighting/mood: cinematic but readable, mystical, premium, emotionally specific to the card, not generic background art
Constraints: each card must feel like a distinct tarot scene, not a repeated template; preserve the original archetype while speaking through this world-specific scene
Avoid: no readable text, no title, no card number, no watermark, no logo, no modern clothing, no cartoon, no anime, no low-detail icon, no UI mockup, no border text
